name: 4 Tier Over-The-Door Storage Rack - Brightroom™: Adjustable Shelves, White Steel, Over Door Organizer, 4 Baskets
description:
Effectively manage your space with the help of this 4-Tier Over-The-Door Storage Rack from Brightroom™. Crafted from metal, this storage rack comes with four removable mesh racks for storing an array of household utilities from toiletries and pantry supplies to craft items or other accessories. It features an adjustable design providing the flexibility to accommodate items of various sizes. Easy to hang by a hook from the back of your door, it offers a space-saving storage option, while the powder-coated white finish lends it a clean look.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.

Overall Dimensions: 45 Inches (H) x 17.75 Inches (W) x 5.75 Inches (D)
Basket Dimensions: 4 Inches (H) x 17.5 Inches (W) x 4 Inches (D)
